line_preview: global kolor gs10					// Set color for histograms
global final "Data/Final"			// Set directory where the final data and the summary tables will be stored
global source "Data/Source"			// Set directory where meta-data are stored
global raw "Data/Source/raw"		// Set directory where orignal captured data are stored
global inputs "Data/Source/inputs" 	// Set directory of source files used to construct empirical inputs
global temp "Data/Temp"				// Set directory to store temporary files
global figures "Figures"			// Set firectory to store exported figures
* Command to run all graph programs
Run numbered programs following their number.
Un-numbered do-files can be ran in whatever order after numbered programs have been ran.
See below for a description of programs stored in the "simulmations" folder.
Summary:	Starts from disaggregated collected data and construct a unique dataset.
Inputs:		Various csv files stored in the "$raw" directory. Each file correspond to a single issue.
Summary:	Import colelcted meta-data about authors characteristics etc.
Summary:	Starts from raw imported data and create the final well-organized dataset.
Notes: 		Two parts of this do-file create sub-samples dummies (will be equal to 1 for each sub-sample in all other do-files)
Summary:	Generates data to estimate selections functions
Summary:	Estimates the non-parametric selection function on various samples and returns residuals
Note:		In this R program, paths are not relative: first and last lines have to be modified, as well as variables lists
